descs.desc:
[WhenUse] At 10+ ([Breath] on self + [Burst] on target), Coin Power +1
[WhenUse] Gain +2 [Breath] Count
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [Burst]
[CriticalOnSucceedAttack] If this unit has [SnakeStance], inflict +1 [Burst] Count

descs.desc:
[WhenUse] Coin Power +1 for every 10 ([Breath] on self + [Burst] on target) (max 2)
[WhenUse] Gain +2 [Breath] Count
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [Burst]
[CriticalOnSucceedAttack] If this unit has [SnakeStance], inflict +1 [Burst] Count

descs.desc:
[WhenUse] At 10+ ([Breath] on self + [Burst] on target), Coin Power +1
[WinDuel] Inflict +1 [Burst] Count
[WinDuel] Gain +2 [Breath] Count
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 2 [Burst]
[OnSucceedAttack] At 30+ [Breath], consume 10 [Breath] on self to Reuse Coin once (1 time max)
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict [BurstPoison]

descs.desc:
[WhenUse] Coin Power +1 for every 10 ([Breath] on self + [Burst] on target) (max 2)
[WinDuel] Inflict +2 [Burst] Count
[WinDuel] Gain +2 [Breath] Count
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 2 [Burst]
[OnSucceedAttack] At 30+ [Breath], consume 10 [Breath] on self to Reuse Coin once (1 time max)
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict [BurstPoison]
[CriticalOnSucceedAttack] Gain 1 [SnakeStance]

descs.desc:
[WhenUse] Coin Power +1 for every 8 ([Breath] on self + [Burst] on target) (max 4)
- If this unit has [SnakeStance], Coin Power +1 for every 5 ([Breath] on self + [Burst] on target) instead (max 6)
[WhenUse] Gain 3 [SnakeStance]
[WinDuel] If target has 5+ [Burst], gain 5 [Breath]
coinDescs:
Deal +5% damage for every ([Breath] on self + [Burst] on target) (max 150%)
If this unit has [SnakeStance], deal +75% Damage on Critical Hit
[OnSucceedAttack] Reduce [BurstPoison] on target by 2
[CriticalOnSucceedAttack] Reduce [BurstPoison] on target by 3
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict [BurstPoison]

descs.desc:
[WhenUse] Coin Power +1 for every 8 ([Breath] on self + [Burst] on target) (max 4)
- If this unit has [SnakeStance], Coin Power +1 for every 5 ([Breath] on self + [Burst] on target) instead (max 6)
[WhenUse] Gain 3 [SnakeStance]
[WinDuel] If target has 5+ [Burst], gain 5 [Breath]
coinDescs:
Deal +10% damage for every ([Breath] on self + [Burst] on target) (max 200%)
If this unit has [SnakeStance], deal +100% Damage on Critical Hit
[OnSucceedAttack] Reduce [BurstPoison] on target by 2
[CriticalOnSucceedAttack] Reduce [BurstPoison] on target by 3
[CriticalOnSucceedAttack] Inflict +2 [Burst] Count
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict [BurstPoison]

descs.desc:
[CanDuelGuard]
[StartBattle] Gain 3 [SnakeStance] next turn
[WhenUse] At 10+ [Breath] Count, Coin Power +1

1121201.name: Heishou Mutation [Si]
1121201.desc:
If the target has [BurstPoison], deal +5% damage for every [SnakeStance] on self (max 15%)
If this unit reduced the target's [BurstPoison] down to 0 Stack, gain 1 [PenetrateDamageUp] next turn (max 2)

1121221.name: Like a Serpent: Flexible, Elastic, and Unpredictable
1121221.desc: If this unit is killed in this Encounter: every turn, at Combat Start, apply 2 [Breath] to the Substituting Identity of the earliest Deployment order
